doc: A playable saw synth with one 'brightness' Good Button (ADR-0017/0032). Send /voicer/notes [midi, gate] to play, then sweep /brightness/in [0..1] — a single knob fanned to a MASTER filter's cutoff AND resonance, each over its own musical range, smoothed into the audio rate. The 8 voices are hosted `good-button-voice` sub-patches (saw -> ADSR VCA); the voicer sums them and one shared filter tones the mix. Built entirely from composition: a public identity `map` fanned to two ranged `map`s, each through an `m2s` converter into the master filter's Signal cutoff/resonance inputs.

nodes.doc: Hosts 8 good-button-voice sub-patches; allocates notes across them and sums their audio.
Master lowpass on the summed mix; cutoff + resonance are Signal inputs driven by the Good Button.

PUBLIC Good Button. The held knob value [0,1] smoothed into a CV Signal (an `m2s` is the value->signal converter), then fanned to the two ranged maps below. Send /brightness/in [0..1]. Rests at 0.5 (ADR-0018).
brightness [0,1] -> cutoff [400,12000] Hz, exponential (perceptually even). Reads the smoothed brightness Signal and ranges it per-sample (Signal->Signal) into the master filter cutoff.
